# Crumb

A homemade cookie business based in Charlotte, North Carolina, offering a warm and personal baking experience. The business caters to a variety of needs — from single cookie purchases to beautifully curated cookie boxes, fully customized cookie designs, and large-scale orders for events and celebrations. The brand carries a cozy, artisan feel rooted in handcrafted quality and local community.

Source: https://crumb.zappy5.app

---

## Handcrafted Cookie Boxes &amp; Warm Homemade Treats — Crumb

URL: https://crumb.zappy5.app
Description: Discover Crumb in Charlotte—where every cookie is a warm, handcrafted experience. From single treats to stunning crumbl cookie boxes, we bake joy for any moment. Order your box today.

## Handcrafted for Every Occasion


From everyday indulgences to grand celebrations, our homemade cookies bring warmth and artistry to your table. Discover the four ways to enjoy Crumb.













### Individual Cookies


Pick your favorites one at a time. The perfect little treat to brighten your day with that just-baked taste.

Order Now →












### Cookie Boxes


Curated boxes for gifts, thank-yous, or sharing. Beautifully packaged and ready to make someone's day sweeter.

Build a Box →











### Custom Cookies


Fully personalized designs for your theme, colors, or logo. Edible art that tells your story, perfect for branding or special milestones.

Get a Quote →











### Event Orders


Large-scale orders for weddings, corporate events, and parties. We handle the baking so you can focus on celebrating.

Plan Your Event →

















## Every Batch Tells a Story


From our cozy Charlotte kitchen to your table, discover the artistry behind every handcrafted cookie. Whether it's a single sweet moment or a grand celebration, our curated boxes and custom designs bring warmth, joy, and a touch of homemade magic to any occasion.























































## Ready to Share Something Sweet?


Whether you're craving a single warm cookie, a beautifully curated cookie box, or need custom treats for a Charlotte celebration, Crumb is here to bake something special for you. Let's start your order conversation today.


Start Your Order
Ask About Events

## Meet the Hands Behind Our Cozy, Artisan Bakery — Crumb

URL: https://crumb.zappy5.app/about
Description: Learn the story of Crumb, a Charlotte-based homemade cookie business built on handcrafted quality and community warmth. See why every batch feels like coming home.

Meet the Hands Behind Our Cozy, Artisan Bakery — Crumb


















































Skip to main content












- AboutServices
- Products
- Contact
0












Products














Our Story

# Baked by hand, shared from the heart



Crumb began in a small Charlotte kitchen with a simple belief: that a homemade cookie has the power to make any moment feel special. What started as weekend baking sessions for friends and neighbors quickly grew into a passion for crafting cookies that feel both nostalgic and new — each batch mixed by hand, scooped with care, and baked until golden and fragrant.



Every cookie we make carries that same warmth and intention. Whether you’re picking up a single treat to brighten your afternoon, ordering a curated box for someone you love, or planning a large-scale celebration, Crumb brings the comfort of a home kitchen to every occasion. We believe that the best things in life are shared, and there’s no better way to connect than over something fresh from the oven.


### Proudly rooted in Charlotte, North Carolina — baking for our community, one batch at a time.























## Baked with Heart, Shared with Joy


Every batch tells a story of handcrafted care and community connection, right here in Charlotte.








### Handmade Quality


We believe in real ingredients, small batches, and the kind of care you can taste. Every cookie is mixed, scooped, and baked by hand — never mass-produced — so each one carries the warmth of a home kitchen.







### Thoughtful Celebration


From beautifully curated cookie boxes to custom designs for your special moments, we treat every order as an opportunity to bring people together. Your celebrations deserve something memorable, and we pour that spirit into every detail.







### Neighborhood Connection


Rooted in Charlotte, we're proud to be part of a community that values local flavor and genuine relationships. Whether you're picking up a single cookie or planning a large event, you're supporting a neighbor who truly cares.













## Our Story in Every Batch


Behind-the-scenes visual proof of craft, artistry, and local authenticity. From our Charlotte kitchen to your table, every cookie is a celebration of handcrafted quality and community love.





























## What Our Customers Say



The love and warmth of homemade cookies, shared by our Charlotte community.











Crumb's cookies are the highlight of every family gathering. The presentation is stunning, and you can taste the love and care in every single bite. They've become our go-to for every celebration.



Sarah Mitchell
Loyal Customer, Charlotte NC










I ordered custom cookie boxes for a corporate event, and the response was overwhelming. The attention to detail, from the hand-decorated designs to the beautiful packaging, made our event feel truly special.



David Chen
Event Coordinator






From thoughtful gifts to large-scale celebrations, Crumb has been part of Charlotte's sweetest moments. Our repeat customers and growing community of cookie lovers inspire us to keep baking with heart, one batch at a time.












Handcrafted artisan breads and pastries, baked fresh daily with locally sourced ingredients in Charlotte.

## Custom Cookie Boxes, Party Trays &amp; Event Orders — Crumb

URL: https://crumb.zappy5.app/services
Description: Create your perfect crumbl cookie party box or design fully customized cookies for birthdays, weddings, and celebrations. Explore our services and let&#39;s bake something unforgettable together.

Custom Cookie Boxes, Party Trays & Event Orders — Crumb


















































Skip to main content












- AboutServices
- Products
- Contact
0












Products














# Handcrafted Cookiesfor Every Sweet Moment


From warm, single-serve indulgences to beautifully curated cookie boxes, fully customized designs, and large-scale event catering — every batch is baked with love in Charlotte, North Carolina. Experience the homemade difference that turns simple ingredients into unforgettable celebrations.


Place Your Order


































Everyday Indulgence

## Individual Cookies


Our individual cookies are baked fresh daily in small batches, using recipes passed down and perfected in our Charlotte kitchen. Each one is a moment of warmth — whether you're treating yourself after a long day or sharing a sweet surprise with someone special.


- Choose from classic flavors like Chocolate Chunk, Brown Butter Toffee, and Double Vanilla Sugar

- Seasonal specials rotate monthly featuring local North Carolina ingredients

- Every cookie is hand-shaped and baked to golden, chewy perfection


Order Cookies












Thoughtful Gifting

## Cookie Boxes


Our signature cookie boxes turn a simple treat into a memorable gift. Each box is thoughtfully arranged with a curated selection of flavors, wrapped in beautiful packaging that feels like opening a present. Perfect for holidays, thank-yous, or just because.


- Available in small (6 cookies), medium (12 cookies), and large (24 cookies) box sizes

- Customizable flavor selections or choose our Baker's Favorites assortment

- Includes a handwritten note card — we'll pen your message for you


Build a Box












Personalized Celebrations

## Custom Cookies


Make your celebration truly one-of-a-kind with custom-designed cookies. From monogrammed initials to elaborate themed sets for baby showers, birthdays, and weddings, we bring your vision to life in butter and sugar. Every detail is hand-piped with care.


- Work directly with our decorator to design colors, shapes, and themes

- Royal icing, fondant accents, metallic details, and edible prints available

- Individually wrapped and packaged for party favors or place settings


Start Your Design












Gatherings & Celebrations

## Event Orders


Hosting a wedding, corporate event, or family reunion? Our large-batch event orders bring homemade warmth to any gathering. We handle everything from dessert tables to individually packaged cookie favors, ensuring your guests leave with a sweet memory of your special day.


- Minimum order of 50 cookies with volume discounts for larger quantities

- Full dessert table styling and setup available within the Charlotte metro area

- Dietary accommodations including gluten-free and vegan options by request


Plan Your Event















## Why Choose Crumb


Beyond the cookies, it's the care, presentation, and personal touch that make every order special.









### Handcrafted with Care


Every batch is mixed, scooped, and baked by hand in our Charlotte kitchen. We use real butter, premium chocolate, and time-honored techniques to deliver that warm, homemade taste you can't find in a factory.









### Gift-Ready Presentation


Whether it's a single cookie or a custom cookie box, presentation matters. Each order is thoughtfully packaged with artisan touches, making it perfect for gifting, celebrations, or simply treating yourself to something beautiful.









### Flexible Event Support


From intimate gatherings to large-scale celebrations, we make ordering easy. Need custom designs, specific quantities, or a crumble cookie party box for a special event? We'll work with you to create the perfect spread, delivered with confidence.














## From Your Idea to the First Bite


A simple, warm process that turns your custom requests and larger orders into handcrafted cookies ready for your table.








### 1. Share Your Vision


Reach out with your idea, whether it's a single box of crumb cookie boxes, a party platter, or a fully customized design. We'll chat about flavors, colors, and the occasion you're celebrating.







### 2. We Plan & Perfect


We sketch out your order, confirm every detail, and source the finest ingredients. For large events, we map out quantities and timelines so everything arrives fresh and beautiful.







### 3. Baked with Love


Your order comes to life in our Charlotte kitchen. Each cookie is mixed, shaped, and decorated by hand, ensuring every batch carries that homemade warmth you can taste.







### 4. Pickup or Delivery


We coordinate a seamless handoff. Swing by for a warm hello in Charlotte, or we'll arrange careful delivery so your crumbl cookie party box arrives picture-perfect and ready to share.














## Frequently Asked Questions


Practical planning information for gift shoppers and event planners. Find answers about our homemade cookies, custom orders, and local Charlotte delivery.








### What sizes do your cookie boxes come in?


We offer a range of sizes to suit every occasion. Our individual cookie boxes are perfect for a personal treat, while our medium boxes (6–8 cookies) and large sharing boxes (12+ cookies) are ideal for gifts, celebrations, and those memorable crumbl cookie boxes moments. We also create custom party boxes for larger gatherings.






### Can I customize my cookie designs?


Absolutely. Customization is at the heart of what we do. From hand-piped messages and themed decorations to specific color palettes and shapes, we work closely with you to design cookies that match your celebration perfectly. Whether it's a crumbl cookie party box or a corporate gift, every batch is made to order.






### Do you offer gift wrapping or personalized notes?


Yes, we believe presentation is everything. Every box is wrapped with artisan paper, tied with baker's twine, and can include a handwritten personal note. It's the perfect way to send a warm, homemade gift straight from our kitchen to someone's doorstep.






### How much notice do you need for large orders?


For standard boxes, we typically require 48 hours notice. For custom designs and large event orders (weddings, parties, corporate events), we recommend reaching out at least 2 weeks in advance. This allows us time to source the finest ingredients and perfect your custom designs.






### Where do you deliver in Charlotte?


We proudly serve Charlotte, North Carolina, and the surrounding communities. We offer local hand-delivery to ensure your cookies arrive fresh and beautifully intact. For specific neighborhoods or questions about our delivery radius, please get in touch — we love connecting with our local community.






### Do you support events and large celebrations?


Yes, we specialize in bringing homemade warmth to large-scale events. From wedding dessert tables and baby showers to corporate gifting and holiday parties, we offer bulk ordering with consistent quality and beautiful presentation. We can even create a custom tasting box so you can sample flavors before your big day.


















Handcrafted artisan breads and pastries, baked fresh daily with locally sourced ingredients in Charlotte.

- AboutServices

0












Products










# Return Policy


Last Updated: 6/24/2026



At Crumb, we want you to be satisfied with your purchase. This policy outlines your rights for returns and refunds.


## 1. Return Window


You may return most items within 30 days of delivery for a full refund.


- Items must be unused and in original condition

- Items must be in original packaging

- Receipt or proof of purchase required




## 2. Non-Returnable Items


- Perishable goods

- Custom or personalized items

- Digital products and opened software

- Personal hygiene products that have been opened




## 3. Damaged or Defective Items


If you receive a damaged or defective item, contact us within 48 hours for a full refund including shipping costs.


## 4. Contact Us



For returns or questions:


Email: [business_email]


Phone: [business_phone]


Address: [business_address]

## Privacy Policy

URL: https://crumb.zappy5.app/privacy
Description: Our privacy policy - how we collect, use, and protect your information

Privacy Policy
















































- AboutServices
- Products
- Contact
0












Products











# Privacy Policy



Last Updated:  6/15/2026



Crumb ("Company", "we", "our") is committed to protecting your privacy. This privacy policy explains how we collect, use and protect your information when you use our website [business_website] ("Service").


## 1. Information Collection


We may collect the following types of information:


- Personal Information: Name, email address, phone number and address

- Technical Information: IP address, browser type, operating system and website usage data

- Cookies: Information stored on your computer to improve user experience




## 2. Use of Information


We use the collected information for the following purposes:


- Providing requested services

- Improving service and user experience

- Contacting you regarding our services

- Compliance with legal requirements




## 3. Information Sharing


We do not sell, rent or share your personal information with third parties, except in the following cases:


- With your explicit consent

- When required by law

- To protect our rights or user safety

- With service providers who assist in operating the service (under confidentiality agreements)




## 4. User Rights


In accordance with Israeli Privacy Protection Law 1981, you have the following rights:


- Right to access personal information stored about you

- Right to correct inaccurate or incomplete information

- Right to delete personal information in certain circumstances

- Right to object to information processing for marketing purposes

- Right to file a complaint with the Data Protection Authority




## 5. Cookies


Our website uses cookies to improve user experience. You can manage cookies through your browser settings. Disabling cookies may affect website functionality.


## 6. Information Security


We implement reasonable security measures to protect your information, including encryption, firewalls and restricted access control. However, no transmission or storage method is 100% secure.


## 7. Policy Changes


We may update this privacy policy from time to time. Material changes will be posted on the website with 30 days advance notice.



## 8. Contact Information


For questions or requests regarding this privacy policy, please contact us:


- Company: Crumb

- Email: [business_email]

- Phone: [business_phone]

- Address: [business_address]



Data Protection Authority: For complaints, you may contact the Data Protection Authority at the Ministry of Justice

## Accessibility Statement

URL: https://crumb.zappy5.app/accessibility
Description: Our accessibility statement - our commitment to digital accessibility

Accessibility Statement
















































- AboutServices
- Products
- Contact
0












Products











# Accessibility Statement



Last updated:  June 15, 2026



Crumb is committed to making our services accessible to all users. We strive to implement the Israeli Standard (TI 5568) based on WCAG 2.1 Level AA guidelines.


Accessibility Level: AA (Israeli Standard TI 5568)



## 1. Accessibility Policy


We believe in equal rights and the right of every person to receive information and services independently and equally. This website was designed and built with special emphasis on accessibility for people with disabilities.


## 2. Accessibility Arrangements on the Site


- Keyboard navigation support

- Screen reader compatibility

- Appropriate color contrast

- Flexible and scalable font sizes

- Descriptive image alt text

- Hierarchical heading structure

- Clear and descriptive links

- Support for 200% zoom without content loss





### WCAG 2.1 Compliance


The website complies with WCAG 2.1 Level AA, which includes:


- Perceivable: Information is presented in ways users can perceive

- Operable: Interface components are operable

- Understandable: Information and user interface are understandable

- Robust: Content can be interpreted by a variety of technologies





## 3. Supported Assistive Technologies


- NVDA (Windows)

- JAWS (Windows)

- VoiceOver (Mac/iOS)

- TalkBack (Android)

- Dragon NaturallySpeaking

- Switch navigation




## 4. Accessibility Testing


The website has been tested using:


- Automated accessibility testing tools

- Manual testing with screen readers

- Keyboard-only navigation

- Color contrast verification

- Testing with users with disabilities




## 5. Continuous Improvements


We are continuously working to improve the accessibility of our website and update it according to technological developments and user feedback.



## 6. Contact and Feedback


If you encounter an accessibility issue on the site or need assistance, please contact us:


- Company: Crumb

- Email: [business_email]

- Phone: [business_phone]



Response time: We respond to accessibility inquiries within 3 business days and work to resolve issues within 10 business days.

Products











# Terms of Use



Last updated:  June 15, 2026



Use of this site constitutes agreement to the terms outlined below. Please read carefully before use.



## 1. Definitions


- "Company" - Crumb

- "User" - Anyone who browses or uses the site

- "Services" - Food & Bakery provided through the site




## 2. Description of Services


Crumb provides Food & Bakery through the site. The services are subject to the terms detailed in this document and may change from time to time.


## 3. Terms of Use


Use of the site is conditional on compliance with the following terms:


- Use of the site for lawful purposes only

- No interference with site operations or other users

- No uploading of offensive, illegal, or harmful content

- Respect for copyright and intellectual property rights

- No actions that may compromise site security




## 4. User Obligations


- Providing accurate and truthful information during registration or ordering

- Maintaining confidentiality of account access details

- Immediate notification of any unauthorized account use

- Updating personal information as needed




## 5. Payment and Refund Policy


If services include payment:


- Payments are processed through secure and encrypted systems

- Prices include applicable taxes as required by law

- Right to cancel will be in accordance with consumer protection laws

- Refunds will be processed within 14 business days of cancellation approval




## 6. Limitation of Liability


Services are provided "as is" without warranty of any kind. The Company will not be liable for indirect, consequential, or special damages arising from use of the site, except where required by law.


## 7. Copyright and Intellectual Property


All content on the site, including text, images, design, and code, is protected by copyright owned by Crumb. Reproduction, distribution, or commercial use of content is prohibited without written permission.


## 8. Privacy


Collection and use of personal information is subject to our Privacy Policy. Use of the site constitutes agreement to the Privacy Policy as detailed separately.


## 9. Changes to Terms of Use


The Company may change these terms of use at any time. Material changes will be posted on the site with 30 days advance notice. Continued use after changes constitutes agreement to the new terms.


## 10. Service Termination


The Company may suspend or limit service at any time, including in cases of terms of use violations. In case of service termination, relevant provisions will remain in effect.


## 11. Governing Law and Dispute Resolution


These terms of use are governed by applicable laws. Any disputes will be resolved in accordance with local jurisdiction, with preference given to arbitration or mediation where possible.


## 12. General Provisions


- If any portion of the terms is found invalid, remaining terms will remain in effect

- Non-enforcement of a right will not be considered a waiver

- These terms of use constitute the entire agreement between the parties





## 13. Contact Information


For questions or clarifications regarding the terms of use:


- Company: Crumb

- Email: [business_email]

- Phone: [business_phone]

- Address: [business_address]

# We'd Love to Hear From You


Whether you're dreaming up custom cookies, planning a gift of curated cookie boxes, organizing an event, or simply have a question — we're here to help. Reach out and let's create something delicious together, right here in Charlotte.


Custom requests, gifting questions, and large event orders are always welcome.














## Let's Start Baking Together


Have a custom order in mind or planning a special event? Fill out the form below and I'll personally get back to you within 24 hours to discuss how we can bring your cookie vision to life.

Email Address




Phone Number

and  Privacy Policy

### Crumb — Charlotte, NC


Crumb is a homemade cookie business rooted in the heart of Charlotte, North Carolina. We specialize in handcrafted cookies that bring warmth, joy, and a touch of artistry to every occasion.









#### Phone

[business_phone]









#### Email

[business_email]









#### Location


Charlotte, North Carolina








#### Best Reasons to Inquire


- Custom cookie designs for birthdays, showers, and corporate gifts

- Beautifully curated cookie boxes for any occasion

- Large-scale orders for weddings, galas, and community events

- Local Charlotte pickup and delivery options available

















## Baking for Charlotte & Beyond


From Dilworth kitchens to your celebration table — every order starts with a conversation.










### Rooted in the Queen City


Crumb is proudly based in Charlotte, North Carolina, serving neighborhoods from Plaza Midwood to South End. Whether you're picking up a dozen cookies for a family dinner or planning a large community event, we bring the warmth of a home bakery to every order.


- Individual cookie orders for everyday cravings

- Curated cookie boxes perfect for gifting

- Fully customized designs for special occasions

- Large-scale orders for weddings, parties, and corporate events










### Let's Talk Cookies


Every batch is made to order, so we take the time to understand exactly what you need. Reach out to discuss flavors, custom decorations, dietary preferences, or delivery logistics across the Charlotte metro area. No request is too small or too grand.





[business_phone]















Let's Bake Something Beautiful

## Ready to Get Started?


Whether you're craving a single homemade cookie, a curated gift box, or custom treats for a Charlotte celebration, we're here to make it personal. Reach out and let us know what you're dreaming up.


Send an Inquiry
